Launch boundary failed closed: no content check performed. LAUNCH-BOUNDARY: invocation-b.json binds identity_ledger_sha256=21a9d1b4064911567acfb10e3fa5543714859e1cac13e5b9f07d6efc181190ac but the actual current ledger at reports/review-context/identity-ledger.json hashes to 8d362613e5056beba91be74e773aa581c53321281f0f55a9ec63d0f72176a4ed (stale/mismatched). The deterministic validator plugins/sdd-quality-loop/scripts/validate-review-context-set.sh, run read-only against invocation-b.json, exits 1 with REVIEW_CONTEXT_IDENTITY: canonical identity ledger hash is stale or mismatched. Additionally the bound run_id task-b-localenvmcp-a1r1-20260705-6851 and host_session_id hs-task-b-6503d1ba-0006 are already persisted at ledger sequence 38 (reports/review-context/identity-ledger.json), i.e. this identity is reused rather than fresh, and no --reserve step atomically extended the ledger to sequence 39 for this invocation. Per role instructions this is fail-closed: reject reused implementation/review/evaluation identity and hash mismatch. No content checks (RISK-APPROPRIATE through BUGFIX-DIAGNOSTIC-PATH) were performed; all nine are reported FAIL/Critical solely due to the blocked launch boundary, not due to any defect found in tasks.md.
